title: Handmade Glass 3 Bundles of Flowers Set - Striped Vase with Pink, Yellow & Navy Glass Blooms | Miniature Tabletop Decor, Home Centerpiece, Gift for Mom & Friends (1)
features: 1. HANDCRAFTED GLASS ARTISTRY: Each glass flower is individually crafted by skilled artisans, featuring translucent pink, sunny yellow, and deep navy blue blooms that capture and refract light beautifully
2. STRIPED VASE DESIGN: Includes an exclusive striped pattern glass vase that adds elegant texture and serves as the perfect display base for your miniature floral arrangement
3. PREMIUM TABLE TOP DISPLAY: Standing 6cm tall, these delicate glass flowers create an enchanting centerpiece for coffee tables, office desks, or shelf displays, adding sophistication to any space
4. MULTI-OCCASION GIFT SET: Perfect as a birthday gift for mom, housewarming present for friends, or thoughtful gesture for colleagues - suitable for various celebrations and home decor styles
5. DURABLE GLASS CONSTRUCTION: Made from high-quality glass with smooth finishes and vibrant colors that resist fading, ensuring your decorative piece maintains its beauty over time
description: Elevate Your Space with Handcrafted Glass Elegance Bring the delicate beauty of handcrafted glass florals into your home with this exquisite three-piece set. Each piece combines artistic craftsmanship with timeless appeal, creating a stunning display that captures light and attention in equal measure. Collection Includes: 1 exclusive striped glass vase 1 translucent pink glass flower (6cm) 1 sunny yellow glass flower (6cm) 1 deep navy blue glass flower (6cm)
